completion_summary: Bound resource profiles into formal method identity, added runner-owned resources.json artifacts computed from raw evidence, required per-attempt live LLM receipts and separate RL checkpoint training ledgers, and made matrix aggregation consume the formal 15-axis reports without summing parallel wall time; 51 focused and 147 integrated tests passed.
